calls.notes: Sets local selectedDocument state. Triggers re-render of the clicked card (renderCard) or row (renderListRow), swapping styles.card → styles.cardSelected (or styles.listRow → styles.listRowSelected): border changes to 2px solid #0f3460, background to #f0f4ff.
Called via this.props.onDocumentSelect(doc). Only invoked if the prop is defined (it always is when DocumentGrid is rendered inside App).
Mounts PreviewPanel beside DocumentGrid. Previously selected document (if any) is replaced without an explicit deselect step.
Receives document prop. Renders document name, file_type, and file_size from the already-loaded doc object (no fetch for metadata).
Constructs URL string: `${API_BASE_URL}/documents/${id}/preview`. The URL is placed in (react-pdf) for PDFs, or for images. The browser fetches the URL — there is no explicit axios/fetch call in JS.
Fetches document row to obtain file_path and file_type; resolves the physical file from config.uploadDir; sends binary with correct Content-Type header. Only triggered for previewable MIME types.
